summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 13→Jul 19 vs Jul 6→Jul 12* · Revenue +27% (1,306,878 vs 1,029,756 EGP) · Spend +12% · ROAS 6.3 (+14%).
   • CPC: 2.16 → 2.05 EGP (-5%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.05% → 0.9% (-14%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,135 → 1,433 EGP (+26%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 53%* of the move (helped, +271,776 EGP)  ·  *CVR 35%* of the move (hurt, -217,188 EGP)  ·  *CPC 12%* of the move (helped, +11,115 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +26%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *271,776 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +14%.
     Revenue +27% because spend +12%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *OURKIDS PJS SCALING LEBLEB MOA*, its AOV went 2539.46 EGP→1250.22 EGP on 5,938 EGP spend (~12% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 13→Jul 19 vs Jul 6→Jul 12* · Revenue +76% (229,234 vs 130,241 EGP) · Spend +68% · ROAS 4.12 (+5%).
   • CPC: 9.79 → 9.0 EGP (-8%, down (good))
   • CVR: 2.01% → 2.34% (+16%, up (good))
   • AOV: 1,915 → 1,581 EGP (-17%, down (drag))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 45%* of the move (hurt, -48,430 EGP)  ·  *CVR 36%* of the move (helped, +32,285 EGP)  ·  *CPC 20%* of the move (helped, +4,889 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* fell -17%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-48,430 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +5%.
     Revenue +76% because spend +68%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120254863762130011|Playmore video + catalogue from all audience - Copy>, its AOV went 2750.0 EGP→1384.5 EGP on 2,753 EGP spend (~34% of the swing).
